allow: PowerShell($count = \(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; "node procs: $count"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server unreachable: $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\([Environment]::NewLine\)[0]\)" })
